features: Great Deal Nail Cleaning Brush Set – Choose from our nail brush set that offers either a pack of 3, a pack of 6, or a box of 12. Unlike any other pack of nail brushes, this one has a greater value for money at the same good quality.

For hygienic nails and hands – These nail brushes for cleaning nails exfoliate around the cuticle area, soften the cuticles and stimulate the nail bed for healthy nail growth. They are essential hygienic nail tools to include in your manicure and pedicure kit for family use.

Double-Sided Hard Nail Brush Bristles – The wooden nail brush is designed with dual-sided firm bristles to loosen up and remove the stubborn dirt and bacteria build up underneath your nails. The hard bristles of this nailbrush are well set and secured at the wooden body, hence will not fall off easily for long time use.

High-quality Wooden Body – This nail brush wooden body is made from a hard-wearing natural wood material that is not easily mould and crack. The body of this small nail brush is also carved for an easy grip.

Must-have Manicure and Pedicure Tools – From the quality of materials used up to their effective usage as nail scrubber brushes to maintain dirt-free nails in your hands and feet, these hard nail brushes are great to have in every household.
